title: Nuclear microsatellite data for Populus nigra and P. alba from Pogorzelica (middle Warta River), Poland
author: Żukowska, Weronika Barbara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains nuclear microsatellite data (PCR products lengths), geographic coordinates, and size class information for  Populus nigra  L. (Pn) and  Populus alba  L. (Pa) individuals sampled in Pogorzelica, located along the middle course of the Warta River in Poland.
steps_raw: This dataset contains nuclear microsatellite data (PCR products lengths), geographic coordinates, and size class information for  Populus nigra  L. (Pn) and  Populus alba  L. (Pa) individuals sampled in Pogorzelica, located along the middle course of the Warta River in Poland.
